summary: Frontend-only testing of Paris Greeters public site migration (homepage + public shell). All requested features validated: home page loads with header/topbar/footer, hero/actualités/testimonials/gallery sections, carousel and lightbox interactions work, all 8 public placeholder routes function correctly with shell intact. No blocking console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: All components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Fallback content system works correctly when CMS data not available
Responsive design properly switches between desktop nav and mobile hamburger menu
seed_data_creation: None - used fallback data from public-site-data.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public shell (TopBar, Header, Footer) validated. Carousel and lightbox interactions tested and working. All 8 placeholder routes (/actualites, /galerie, /livre-dor, /contact, /qui-sommes-nous, /devenez-benevole, /presse, /mentions-legales) confirmed working with public shell intact. Mobile responsive view tested and working.

features_tested.home_page_load: PASS - Homepage loads at http://127.0.0.1:3100 with all components
features_tested.topbar_cta: PASS - 'Réserver une balade' button visible and links to booking system
features_tested.header_navigation: PASS - Desktop nav shows 7 links, mobile menu works
features_tested.hero_section: PASS - Slogan and subtitle displayed correctly
features_tested.testimonials_carousel: PASS - Prev/Next buttons change testimonial content
features_tested.gallery_lightbox: PASS - Lightbox opens, prev/next/close buttons work
features_tested.public_routes: PASS - All 8 placeholder routes load with shell intact
features_tested.mobile_responsive: PASS - Mobile menu and all sections work correctly

mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs - using fallback data from lib/public-site-data.ts
